top_signals.title: Iranian, Russian Crude Premiums Slide as China Pulls Back on Imports
top_signals.summary: Weak demand from Iran’s top crude buyer, China, has dragged Iranian flagship oil prices into discounts to ICE Brent for the first time in two months, trade sources told Reuters on Thursday. Demand for Iranian oil in its biggest export market has waned in recent weeks, as imports in China slump to multi-month lows and the independent refiners, the so-called teapots that buy the bulk of Iran’s oil, reduce run rates. This has dragged the price of Iranian Light crude to discounts ranging from $0.50 to $1 per barrel to ICE Brent for delivery…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CISA Admin Leaked AWS GovCloud Keys on Github
top_signals.summary: Until this past weekend, a contractor for the Cybersecurity & Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) maintained a public GitHub repository that exposed credentials to several highly privileged AWS GovCloud accounts and a large number of internal CISA systems. Security experts said the public archive included files detailing how CISA builds, tests and deploys software internally, and that it represents one of the most egregious government data leaks in recent history.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Finland's president says EU should expand to 40 states — including Canada
top_signals.summary: Finnish President Alexander Stubb said the European Union needs to expand to project power on the global stage.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.summary: U.S. chipmakers plunged in premarket trading after Broadcom earnings disappointed investors.

top_signals.title: Lex Greensill banned as company director for nine years after multi-billion-pound collapse
top_signals.summary: The UK Insolvency Service has confirmed that financier Lex Greensill will face a nine-year ban from serving as a company director, after he signed a legally binding disqualification undertaking to resolve long-running enforcement proceedings just days before a scheduled High Court trial. The Insolvency Service, which opened its probe into him in 20222, filed a [...]

top_signals.title: Japan officials met metals and LNG firms in unusual Moscow Talks
top_signals.summary: The talks underscored the importance Tokyo and Moscow place on keeping channels of communication open.
